message:
fix: add Unicode punctuation equivalence to apply_patch fuzzy matching (GAP-8.13)

Models sometimes produce typographic quotes, en/em dashes, and ellipses
instead of ASCII equivalents. indexOfLine now has a third matching pass
that normalizes Unicode punctuation, and the context/delete line checks
use the same fuzzyLineMatch helper for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
